title: 7 Things Scripture Says About the Work of Your 20s
caption:
7 things Scripture says about the work of your 20s. None of them are about the paycheck.

Work is worship before it's a paycheck. Whatever you're building in secret is still being watched. Faithful with little comes before trusted with much.

The work nobody claps for is often the work that matters most. Diligence beats talent on a long enough timeline.

#faith #work #scripture #christianman #manofgod
